footer.description: Uniting hearts through micro-donations to support children and youth with disabilities, cancer, or autism at CRIT rehabilitation centers. Every donation transforms a life.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Teletón. A micro-philanthropy platform for the rehabilitation and inclusion of children and youth.

auth.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to share your message of support and track your donations that help children with disabilities, cancer, or autism
auth.agreementText: By signing in, you agree to our
auth.pleaseWait: Please wait while we complete the authentication

errors.invalid_state: The authentication session expired. Please try again.
errors.parse_failed: There was an error processing the authentication response.
errors.failed_to_initiate_auth: Could not start the authentication process.
errors.default: An unexpected error occurred during authentication.

home.heroSubtitle: Every shared photo fuels our micro-philanthropy mission to build and operate CRIT rehabilitation centers for children and youth with disabilities.
home.emptySubtitle: Be the first to share your support!

gallery.uploadAndDonate: Upload a photo and donate as little as $1.00
gallery.signInToUpload: Sign in to share a photo

upload.title: Share Your Support Photo
upload.subtitle: Add your voice of solidarity to the Teletón community
upload.descriptionPlaceholder: Share a message of hope or solidarity...
upload.agreement: By uploading, you confirm that you have the rights to share this photo and agree to our terms of service.
upload.successSubtitle: Your message of support has been added to the Teletón Wall of Hope.
upload.donationRequiredDesc: To upload a photo, you need to make a donation first. Each donation allows you to share one photo on the Wall of Hope.
upload.errorUploadRetry: Failed to upload image. Please try again.

donation.title: Make a Donation
donation.subtitle: Support Teletón and share your photo on our Wall of Hope
donation.step2: 2. Upload your photo to the Wall of Hope
donation.step3: 3. Your photo will be displayed with your donor badge
donation.errorConnection: Failed to connect to payment service

donationSuccess.title: Thank You for Your Donation!
donationSuccess.subtitle: Your support helps build and operate CRIT centers that transform the lives of children and youth with disabilities.
donationSuccess.processingMessage: Your donation is being processed. This may take a few moments.
donationSuccess.uploadLater: You can upload your photo now or later from the gallery. Each donation allows you to share one photo on the Wall of Hope.

donationCancel.title: Donation Cancelled
donationCancel.subtitle: No worries! Your donation was not processed. You can try again whenever you're ready.
donationCancel.helpMessage: If you experienced any issues during checkout, please contact our support team.

myPosts.title: My Messages
myPosts.subtitle: All the support photos you've shared
myPosts.emptySubtitle: Donate and share your first message of hope!

myDonations.title: My Donations
myDonations.subtitle: Your contribution history
